response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to formally appeal the recent account block. My account was temporarily suspended due to suspicious payments that I did not make. I am concerned that the block may have been misapplied and that my account should be reinstated.  

I have reviewed the payment history and can confirm that all transactions were legitimate and within my account's usage. I am prepared to provide additional documentation to support my case. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss this matter further and to have my account unblocked.  

Thank you for your attention to this request. I look forward to a prompt resolution.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
